items.title: The US says one of ASML’s top chip tools is in China. ASML says it isn’t.
items.summary: The US has accused the one company on Earth that makes the machines behind cutting-edge chips of letting one slip into China. It has not shown its proof, and the company says it never happened. In a series of recent meetings, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick…
items.titleZh: 美国表示，ASML的顶级芯片工具之一在中国。ASML表示并非如此。
items.summaryZh: 美国指责地球上一家制造尖端芯片背后机器的公司让一台机器进入中国。它没有出示证据，该公司表示从未发生过。在最近的一系列会议上，商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克…

items.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI bill would hand the public half of OpenAI, Anthropic and xAI
items.summary: Bernie Sanders has turned a talking point into a bill, and it goes further than anything Silicon Valley or the White House has put on the table. On Thursday, the Vermont senator introduced legislation that would hit the largest AI companies with a one-time 50…
items.titleZh: 伯尼·桑德斯的人工智能法案将把OpenAI、Anthropic和xAI的一半交给公众
items.summaryZh: 伯尼·桑德斯将一个谈话要点变成了一项法案，这比硅谷或白宫提出的任何法案都要深入。周四，这位佛蒙特州参议员提出了一项立法，将一次性对最大的人工智能公司处以50…

items.title: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
items.summary: Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023 spanning Altman's termination and reinstatement as CEO, had been in…
items.titleZh: 关于萨姆·奥特曼的电影已被亚马逊米高梅公司撤下
items.summaryZh: 据报道，Luca Guadagnino关于OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman的电影《Artificial》已被亚马逊米高梅公司撤下。这部电影由安德鲁·加菲尔德主演，讲述了2023年奥特曼被终止和恢复首席执行官职务五天的过山车故事…

items.title: The miracle of capitalism, with Silicon Valley characteristics
items.summary: Silicon Valley's equity-powered brand of capitalism is minting  millionaires. Here's how techies are avoiding big tax bills when they cash out.
items.titleZh: 具有硅谷特色的资本主义奇迹
items.summaryZh: 硅谷以股权为动力的资本主义品牌正在造就百万富翁。以下是技术人员在套现时如何避免巨额税款。

items.title: I watched enterprises buy AI that solved the wrong problem. So I left Dell and built a startup to fix it
items.summary: The healthcare industry's broken prior authorization process isn't just a patient problem — it's a warning sign for every regulated industry deploying AI without the infrastructure to govern it.
items.titleZh: 我看到企业购买解决了错误问题的人工智能。所以我离开了戴尔，成立了一家初创公司来解决这个问题
items.summaryZh: 医疗保健行业的事先授权流程被打破，这不仅仅是一个患者问题，也是每个在没有基础设施的情况下部署人工智能的受监管行业的一个警告信号。

items.title: He spent 15 months hunting for compliance software that didn’t exist. So he built Flagright, which just raised $12.5M.
items.summary: Baran Ozkan spent 15 months looking for software that did not exist. As head of financial-crime product at a European bank, he wanted a single tool to catch money laundering and fraud. Vendors overpromised. His own employer tried to build one in-house and fai…
items.titleZh: 他花了15个月的时间寻找不存在的合规软件。所以他建立了Flagright，刚刚筹集了1250万美元。
items.summaryZh: Baran Ozkan花了15个月的时间寻找不存在的软件。作为一家欧洲银行的金融犯罪产品负责人，他希望有一个单一的工具来打击洗钱和欺诈。供应商供过于求。他自己的雇主试图在内部建造一个，但失败了…

items.title: General Atlantic wants to back China’s Kling AI at $18bn. Beijing is telling its AI firms to refuse US money.
items.summary: A US investor wants to buy into China’s most successful AI-video company. The timing could hardly be more awkward. General Atlantic is in talks to lead the first outside funding round for Kling AI, the video arm of Chinese tech group Kuaishou, Bloomberg repor…
items.titleZh: 通用航空希望以180亿美元的价格支持中国的Kling AI。北京正在告诉其人工智能公司拒绝美国的资金。
items.summaryZh: 一位美国投资者希望收购中国最成功的人工智能视频公司。时机再尴尬不过了。据彭博社报道，General Atlantic正在谈判领导中国科技集团快手旗下视频部门Kling AI的第一轮外部融资…
